summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Alpha Agency website updates. All major features working correctly including brand name changes, French terminology, business hours, admin access, and API functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Triple-click on footer logo not triggering admin redirect

passed_tests: Brand name 'Alpha Agency' (not ALPHA) throughout site
Community Management with '(gestion des réseaux sociaux)' explanation
Business hours 'Du mardi au samedi de 10h à 19h' in footer
Business hours displayed on contact page
Admin login page at /alpha-admin-2024 without public registration
Super admin login with correct credentials
Document types API with 2 types and 8 templates total
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix triple-click functionality on footer logo to properly redirect to /alpha-admin-2024. The click handler may need adjustment in Footer.jsx component.
